events.reason: Invented numbers not in tool results; Off-topic focus on council district instead of zip code

answer: The highest number of crime reports occurred in Council District 3, with 7,301 incidents, followed by District 9 with 6,544. For code violations, the zip code 78758 had the most cases at 978, followed by 78741 with 942. This data highlights areas with the most activity for both crime and code violations during the same period.
